articles.title: Binance Coin (BNB) Sets Record For Largest Monthly Candle Ever
articles.description: One after another, cryptocurrencies like Bitcoin and Ethereum have been breaking out and above their former all-time highs, causing a surge of FOMO and price discovery to follow. The latest coin to do so, is exchange token Binance Coin (BNB), which has now set a record for its largest monthly candle – dollar for dollar – […]

articles.title: DLT platform IOTA releases tokenization framework
articles.description: CryptoNinjas » DLT platform IOTA releases tokenization framework IOTA, a distributed ledger technology platform designed to connect people and devices for sharing information and value, today made two major announcements. First is the release of its framework for tokenizing assets on the Tangle, IOTA’s native protocol. Second, IOTA is also announcing a partnership with digital asset...

articles.title: IOTA Soars 20 Percent on Release of Digital Assets Framework
articles.description: IOTA surged over 20 percent after unlocking tokenization with its digital assets framework

articles.title: Cosmos Chains Can Evolve Into Polkadot Parachains Thanks to New SDK
articles.description: Cosmos developers will be welcoming the news that their chains can now connect with Polkadot’s Substrate network of parachains with minimal effort. Until now, projects elected to build on Cosmos would have been forced to remain there, given the costs and time associated with migrating to a different blockchain and rebuilding from scratch. A new […]

articles.title: The Graph adds support for Polkadot, NEAR, Solana and Celo
articles.description: The global network of open APIs is expanding to support new layer 1 blockchains.
